zh.lifeSummary: 當Johann Ludwig Rauenzahner於1711年7月13日出生在德國賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登時，他的父親Johannes Rauenzahner28歲，母親Anna Kumpf20歲。他和Elizabeth Barbara Long至少有9個兒子和1個女兒。他於1755年住在美國賓夕法尼亞州貝可斯洛可藍德 堂史普。他在美國賓夕法尼亞州被列為linen weaver, yeoman farmer。他去世於1778年11月12日在美國賓夕法尼亞州亞當斯格曼 堂史普享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johann Ludwig Rauenzahner于1711年7月13日出生在德国賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登时，他的父亲Johannes Rauenzahner28岁，母亲Anna Kumpf20岁。他和Elizabeth Barbara Long至少有9个儿子和1个女儿。他于1755年住在美国宾夕法尼亚州貝可斯洛可藍德 堂史普。他在美国宾夕法尼亚州被列为linen weaver, yeoman farmer。他去世于1778年11月12日在美国宾夕法尼亚州亞當斯格曼 堂史普享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Johann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Ludwig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from hlud ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’; an ancient royal and imperial name. See Louis .

variants.name: Louis
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

historicEvents.description: Historical Boundaries 1752: Berks, Pennsylvania Colony, British Colonial America 1776: Berks, Pennsylvania, United States
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.
The Declaration of Independence was signed in Philadelphia on July 4, 1776. The liberty bell was first rung here to Celebrate this important document.

en.lifeSummary: When Johann Ludwig Rauenzahner was born on 13 July 1711, in Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hesse, Germany, his father, Johannes Rauenzahner, was 28 and his mother, Anna Kumpf, was 20. He had at least 9 sons and 1 daughter with Elizabeth Barbara Long. He lived in Rockland Township, Berks, Pennsylvania, United States in 1755. His occupation is listed as linen weaver, yeoman farmer in Pennsylvania, United States. He died on 12 November 1778, in Germany Township, Adams, Pennsylvania, United States, at the age of 67.

Il a eu au moins 9 fils et 1 fille avec Elizabeth Barbara Long. Il a vécu à Rockland Township, Berks, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis en 1755. Sa profession de son indiquée est linen weaver, yeoman farmer à Pennsylvanie, États-Unis. Il est décédé le 12 novembre 1778, à Germany Township, Adams, Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 67 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johann Ludwig Rauenzahner è nato il il 13 luglio 1711 nel Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Germania, il suo padre, Johannes Rauenzahner, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Anna Kumpf, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 9 figli e 1 figlia con Elizabeth Barbara Long. Vissuto a Rockland Township, Berks, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1755. La sua occupazione è indicata come linen weaver, yeoman farmer nel Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America. Morì il 12 novembre 1778, nel Germany Township, Adams, Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Johann Ludwig Rauenzahnerが1711年7月13日にドイツヘセンオデンワルドクレイスビールフエルデンで生まれた時，父Johannes Rauenzahnerは28歳，母Anna Kumpfは20歳であった。彼はElizabeth Barbara Longとの間に少なくとも9人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1755年にはアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州バークスロックランド トウンシュイップに住んでいた。アメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州での職業はlinen weaver, yeoman farmerと記録されている。彼は1778年11月12日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州アダムズジャーマニー トウンシュイップで67歳で死去した。

ko.Germany Township, Adams, Pennsylvania, U: 미국 펜실베이니아 주 애댐스 그먼이 타운시프
ko.lifeSummary: Johann Ludwig Rauenzahner(이)가 1711년 7월 13일 독일 헤센 오데월드크레이스 브이르펠든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Johannes Rauenzahner(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Kumpf(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Barbara Long(와)과 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1755년도에 미국 펜실베이니아 주 버크스 록랜드 타운시프에서 살았다. 그의 직업은 미국 펜실베이니아 주에서 linen weaver, yeoman farmer이었다. 그는 1778년 11월 12일 미국 펜실베이니아 주 애댐스 그먼이 타운시프에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johann Ludwig Rauenzahner nasceu em 13 de julho de 1711, em Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemanha, seu pai, Johannes Rauenzahner, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Anna Kumpf, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 9 filhos e 1 filha com Elizabeth Barbara Long. Ele viveu em Rockland Township, Berks, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América em 1755. Sua profissão aparece como linen weaver, yeoman farmer em Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América. Ele faleceu em 12 de novembro de 1778, em Germany Township, Adams, Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johann Ludwig Rauenzahner родился 13 июля 1711 г. в местности бирфелден, оденвалдкрис, Гессен, Германия, его отцу по имени Johannes Rauenzahner было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Kumpf, 20. У него было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 1 дочь от Elizabeth Barbara Long. Он жил в местности роккланд тоуншип, биркс, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в 1755 году.  Он работал по профессии linen weaver, yeoman farmer в местности Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты. Он умер 12 ноября 1778 г. в местности джирмани тоуншип, адамс, Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johann Ludwig Rauenzahner nació el 13 de julio de 1711, en Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hessen, Alemania, su papá, Johannes Rauenzahner, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Anna Kumpf, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 9 hijos y 1 hija con Elizabeth Barbara Long. Vivió en Rockland Township, Berks, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos en 1755. Su ocupación registrada era linen weaver, yeoman farmer en Pensilvania, Estados Unidos. Murió el 12 de noviembre de 1778, en Germany Township, Adams, Pensilvania, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 67 años.
